nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for administrative tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to artistic jobs
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a time saver, especially in the more monotonous parts of the job

nodes.label: AI as creative collaborator for reference generation
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for original art creation
nodes.grounding_span: creating my own reference photos... a new and exciting way to have AI as a tool

nodes.label: AI-generated description quality: engaging and personal
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated description quality: boring and literal
nodes.grounding_span: the platforms AI does a good generic start... I find the descriptions are very boring

nodes.label: AI reliability in specialized tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Gemini stated that it could... however when I imported the file... it was all black

nodes.label: Collaborative control over AI tasks
nodes.label_negative: Full delegation to AI without oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I like to maintain some control over most tasks so I am usually collaborating the whole time

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and artistic integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I do the art myself as it is what I love

nodes.label: Artistic differentiation and market success
nodes.grounding_span: I have actually found a boost in discovery of my art

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI as a tool
nodes.grounding_span: I now see it as a tool

nodes.label: Disappointment with AI failure on color palette
nodes.grounding_span: I was super excited to try this out, however when I imported the file... it was all black

nodes.label: Ambivalence about AI image generation in art community
nodes.grounding_span: I am on the fence about its use as many people can abuse this feature

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I will start with an idea for a blog post and then work through it with an AI model, refining things adding stuff, taking stuff out or changing tone

nodes.label: Strategic layering of AI tools for differentiation
nodes.grounding_span: I just take it a step further and run the descriptions a final time through Chat GPT or a similar model to make it even more polished
